experiment: hda exact / high-precision LP entry experiment

exported_lp.structure: pure inequalities A_ub x <= b_ub plus finite variable bounds; no equalities

reference_values.note: candidate A (#662) Neumaier-Shcherbina safe bound; sound but loose

sound_presolve_core.note: presolve barely reduces the system; exact solve faces near-full scale (rank-reduction lever confirmed dead)

E1_tau_relaxation_homotopy.description: min c^T x s.t. A x <= b + tau, bounds; tau -> 0+ approaches the true LP optimum

E2_infeasibility_core.interpretation: Arrhenius 6.3e10 pre-exponential coupled to a ~1e-13 aux and a 6.2e-10 envelope slope; feasibility hinges on a 6.8e-11-scale term vs a 6.59e-11 RHS, below HiGHS's ~1e-7 feasibility tolerance. Exact arithmetic keeps the term and finds a feasible point; float64 drops it and false-infeasibles.

verdict_detail: Higher-precision/exact arithmetic (a) resolves the false-infeasible (2-row core: float64 infeasible, exact feasible with zero-violation witness), and (b) the recoverable root McCormick LP bound is ~-6.468e4 -- about 5.4 orders of magnitude tighter than candidate A's -1.80e10. The residual gap to opt -5964.53 is the genuine McCormick relaxation gap (a relaxation property, not a precision artifact) and is not closable by LP precision alone.
tractability: Full exact-rational solve is intractable with a naive pure-Python dense tableau (2883x1096 irreducible core; presolve does not shrink it), but is routine for a real exact-LP library (QSopt_ex / SoPlex-exact) at this size. A float64 solve with a tiny feasibility relaxation (tau~1e-8) already recovers the tight bound in milliseconds, indicating LP iterative refinement (Gleixner-Steffy-Wolter) is a cheaper sufficient lever than full exact rational.
recommendation: GO (research-scale), root-only / numerical-failure-triggered. Integrate an LP iterative-refinement layer (f128/rational residuals over feral, GSW-style) or an exact-rational LP invoked only when a node LP false-fails -- NOT on the hot per-node path. Exact LP fixes certificate soundness+tightness of the root bound but does not by itself solve hda (the McCormick gap to opt remains a branch-and-reduce / relaxation problem).
